text: I’ve joined a new gym and am already loving the energy—pushing myself to new limits feels amazing. This morning, I laced up for an early run under a sun shower, and the sight of a double rainbow lit up the sky—pure magic! It’s moments like these that recharge me. Plus, my second phone interview went brilliantly, and I’m thrilled to announce I’m now a literacy coach! Ready to inspire and support others on their learning journeys. Grateful for every step forward.
